name: AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am
venue: Pebble Beach Golf Links / Spyglass Hill / Monterey Peninsula CC
description: Iconic PGA Tour pro-am pairing celebrities, CEOs, and athletes with Tour pros across three legendary Monterey Peninsula courses. Public spectator access with amateur participants playing alongside the best in the world.

name: Patrick Warburton Celebrity Golf Tournament
description: 16th annual celebrity charity event benefiting St. Jude Children's Research Hospital. Patrick Warburton hosts A-list celebrities, athletes, and sponsors for a star-studded desert weekend.

name: ACG Orange County Charity Golf Classic
description: Annual charity golf classic attracting ACG members from chapters throughout California. 144 golfers compete for prizes while supporting local business community causes.

name: Insperity Invitational Pro-Am
venue: The Woodlands Country Club Tournament Course
description: PGA Tour Champions event presented by UnitedHealthcare. Pro-am days allow ticket holders access alongside tour legends. Signature charitable giving supporting Houston-area nonprofits. Purchase pro-am spots for the rare chance to play with Champions Tour greats.

name: Tom Coughlin Jay Fund Celebrity Golf Classic
description: 31st annual celebrity golf classic hosted by former NFL head coach Tom Coughlin. Benefits families battling childhood cancer. NFL legends and celebrities tee it up at TPC Sawgrass, home of THE PLAYERS Championship.

name: Murray Bros. Caddyshack Invitational
description: 25th annual celebrity charity event featuring Bill Murray and the Murray Bros. alongside celebrity friends and musicians. One of the most beloved and sought-after invitations in golf charity circles. Sold out annually.

name: Southwest Florida Celebrity Golf Invitational
description: Annual celebrity golf invitational benefiting St. Jude Children's Research Hospital. Three days of golf, entertainment, and charity auctions at the exclusive Bonita Bay East.

name: Ne-Yo Celebrity Golf Tournament
description: 2nd Annual celebrity tournament hosted by Grammy-winning artist Ne-Yo. Benefits The Oasis Academy. Past attendees include Anthony Anderson, Chris Tucker, Reggie Jackson, Ed Reed, and DJ Cassidy.

name: Augusta Charity Classic
description: 17th Annual Augusta Charity Classic at Champions Retreat. Community-focused event near Augusta National during Masters season, benefiting local charities.

name: Paul Anderson Youth Home Golf Classic
description: 33rd Annual Golf Classic sponsored by Publix Super Markets Charities. Supports PAYH's mission to serve at-risk youth in northeast Georgia.

name: Waterway House Sports & Spirits Charity Tournament
description: Annual charity golf tournament on the Grand Strand. Sports-themed with spirits sponsorships and community fundraising. $150 per player entry.

name: BTS Charity Golf Tournament
description: Hosted by Black's Tire & Auto Service across two Myrtle Beach National courses. Community-focused charity event on the famous Grand Strand.

name: American Family Insurance Championship Pro-Am
description: PGA Tour Champions event at TPC Wisconsin hosted by Steve Stricker. Little Big Town headlines the 2026 concert. Has raised nearly $22M for American Family Children's Hospital. Pro-am days open to charity participants.

name: Stifel Charity Classic
description: Charles Schwab Cup Playoff event at historic Norwood Hills Country Club. Pro-am days offer rare access alongside Champions Tour greats. A premier St. Louis fall tradition benefiting local charities.

name: Vikings Foundation Golf Tournament
description: Annual Minnesota Vikings Foundation fundraiser presented by Molson Coors. Play alongside Vikings legends and current players. Proceeds benefit Vikings Youth Football and community programs.

name: Rod Simons Memorial Golf for the Gift
description: 19th Annual charity golf tournament supporting adoption grants through the Gift of Adoption Fund. Minnesota's premier charity golf event for adoption advocacy at scenic Troy Burne Golf Club.

name: Larry the Cable Guy Git-R-Done Golf Classic
description: 15th annual celebrity charity event returning to Nebraska. Day 1: tailgate gala at Memorial Stadium with sports legends. Day 2: charity golf tournament. Raised over $8.1M for children's hospitals, veterans groups, and community orgs.

name: Goodwill of Southern NE Spring Classic Golf Tournament
description: Annual spring golf classic benefiting Goodwill of Southern New England's workforce development programs. Scenic Quidnessett CC overlooking Narragansett Bay.

name: NCYMCA Special Olympics Sharks Golf Tournament
description: 10th Annual tournament supporting Special Olympics athletes in Rhode Island at Green Valley Country Club.

name: Coaches Legacy Golf Invitational
description: Utah's #1 charity golf event featuring head football coaches Kyle Whittingham (Utah) and Kalani Sitake (BYU). High-demand invitational supporting the National Kidney Foundation of Utah and Idaho.

name: B.U.L.L. Session Charity Classic
description: 36th anniversary of Oregon's largest charity golf event. Business, university, legal, and leadership community comes together for golf and giving. A longstanding Portland tradition raising millions for local causes.

name: Autism Society of Oregon Annual Charity Golf Tournament
description: 13th Annual charity tournament at prestigious Pumpkin Ridge Golf Club. Benefits the Autism Society of Oregon's services for individuals and families affected by autism.

name: Jimmy Rane Charity Golf Tournament & Banquet
venue: RTJ Golf Trail at Capitol Hill
description: 26th annual premier Alabama charity event. Banquet May 14 at Renaissance Montgomery Hotel with Coach Mike Krzyzewski as guest speaker. Tournament May 15. NFL and sports legends attend annually.

name: ACS Oklahoma Golf Classic
description: American Cancer Society's annual golf classic at prestigious Oak Tree Country Club. One of Oklahoma's premier charity golf events raising funds for cancer research and patient services.

name: Isaiah Joe Charity Golf Tournament
description: Annual charity tournament hosted by NBA guard Isaiah Joe. Celebrity athletes and community leaders participate in support of Oklahoma youth initiatives.

name: St. Jude Oklahoma Golf Classic
description: 2nd annual St. Jude Oklahoma Golf Classic presented by Bob Moore Infiniti. Benefits St. Jude Children's Research Hospital. Rapidly growing as a premier Oklahoma charity golf event.
